title: Exercises: Security Analysis and Implementation
description: Hands-on exercises for analyzing and implementing code-based crypto securely

exercises.title: ISD Complexity Calculator
exercises.description: Calculate ISD attack complexity for various parameters.
exercises.task: Implement functions to estimate Prange and Stern complexity.

exercises.title: Constant-Time Primitives
exercises.task: Create secure constant-time comparison and selection functions.

exercises.title: Parameter Recommender
exercises.task: Create a function that suggests appropriate Classic McEliece parameters.

exercises.title: Security Comparison Tool
exercises.description: Compare security of different code-based schemes.
exercises.task: Create a comparison tool for McEliece vs BIKE.
exercises.starterCode:
